biological_replicate: human cell lines, including HEK293, HeLa, MHCC97H, SW480 and HT29, T24 and TCC, MDA231 and T47D
experimental_design: comparison of Nt-formylated proteins across human cell lines
we measured Nt-formylated proteins by anti-fMetHs-based immunoblotting in a set of human cell lines
factor_value: the treatment of PDF inhibitor actinonin dramatically increased the levels of Nt-formylated native proteins in SW480 cells
